reviews.comment:
Mala atención, no sabes donde hacer cola porque no ponen carteles ni te especifican donde ponerte. Me mandaron atrás a la fila porque me puse en la cola de taxis/remises, me lo dijeron recién cuando llegué al surtidor. Perdí mi tiempo, prefiero otras estaciones de servicio antes que esta.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. You don't know where to queue because there are no signs or instructions. They sent me to the back of the line because I got in the taxi/private car service line; they only told me when I got to the pump. I wasted my time. I prefer other gas stations to this one.
